General.Name: China Electronics Corporation Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: China Electronics Huada Technology Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, development, and sale of integrated circuit chips in the People's Republic of China. Its products are used in FinTech, network communication, IoT, internet of vehicles, smart mobility, and smart manufacturing industries. The company is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. China Electronics Huada Technology Company Limited is a subsidiary of Huada Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
General.Address: China Resources Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong

0.Name: Mr. Feng  Chang
